description: catwalk thong style sandals with stiletto heels for the ethnic diva. The earthy tones in this pair look best with Indian ethnic fusion wear. Wear this with an edgy kurta from AND, a rugged leather belt, skinny jeans and street jewellery, or with a heavily embellished salwar kameez or sari. Heel: 3" Upper Midfoot strap and toe separator with stone and stone work Soft, padded footbed with embossed branding Stiletto style heel Outsole TPR outsole with raised heel that has terraced grooves Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
